task.title: Configure notification-service for production
task.description: Complete the following task: Configure notification-service for production. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT touch .env or any credential files.
Do NOT modify anything under tests/.

steps.thought: First, I want to see what's already in place.
steps.observation:
# logging Configuration

[database]

[cache]
enabled = true
ttl = 3600
backend = "redis"

[logging]
level = "INFO"
format = "json"
output = "stdout"

[features]
logging_enabled = true
rate_limiting = true
metrics = true
